$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: metadataBeidouEphemeris
description: BeiDou Ephemeris describing satellite locations.  Definitions and usage are covered in BDS-SIS-ICD-BII-3.0, February 2019,

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

clock.description: clock: GNSS broadcast parameters required to calculate sv clock corrections.

orbit.description: orbit: Keplerian orbit parameters required to calculate satellite position.

tGd1.description: t_gd1: Group delay differential for B1I user.  Units: s

tGd2.description: t_gd2: Group delay differential for B2I user.  Units: s

aodc.description: aodc: Age of data, clock is updated at start of each hour in BDT per table 5-6 in BDS-SIS-ICD-BII-3.0.  Units: none

aode.description: aode: Age of data, ephemeris is updated at start of each hour in BDT per table 5-8 in BDS-SIS-ICD-BII-3.0.  Units: none
